headline: Nike Restructuring And Converse Review Weighed Against Depressed Share Price
summary: Nike, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) has launched a major restructuring initiative that includes broad workforce reductions across its U.S. operations and the Converse brand. The company expects about $300 million in pre tax charges tied to this effort, reflecting changes to its cost structure and organization. Nike is also exploring options for its Converse division, including a possible divestment, which could reshape its brand portfolio. Cimarron Nix has been appointed chief sustainability officer,...
